publicationRule: Only officially verified statewide or documented state-agency opener dates are published. If a state has only one or two verified opener dates, publish only those dates. Do not require all three season types. Do not publish third-party-only dates.
notes: State wildlife/DNR agency pages are the source of truth. Third-party pages may be used as leads only. States not listed here remain unpublished until official verification is complete.

IA.source: Iowa Department of Natural Resources hunting seasons

seasons.title: Iowa Archery Deer Opener
seasons.description: Official Iowa DNR archery early split deer opener for 2026/27.

seasons.title: Iowa Shotgun 1 Deer Opener
seasons.description: Official Iowa DNR Shotgun 1 deer opener for 2026/27. DeerCamp maps Iowa shotgun to the gun/rifle opener slot.

seasons.title: Iowa Early Muzzleloader Deer Opener
seasons.description: Official Iowa DNR early muzzleloader deer opener for 2026/27.

IL.source: Illinois Department of Natural Resources deer hunting pages

seasons.title: Illinois Archery Deer Opener
seasons.description: Official Illinois DNR archery deer opener for 2026/27. Season continuity differs for Cook, DuPage, Lake and Kane County east of Route 47, but opener date is Oct. 1.

seasons.title: Illinois Firearm Deer Opener
seasons.description: Official Illinois DNR First Firearm Deer Season opener for 2026.

seasons.title: Illinois Muzzleloader-Only Deer Opener
seasons.description: Official Illinois DNR muzzleloader-only deer opener for 2026.

60048.note: Libertyville / Lake County: Illinois DNR lists continuous archery season Oct. 1, 2026 - Jan. 17, 2027 for Lake County; opener remains Oct. 1.

MN.source: Minnesota Department of Natural Resources hunting season dates

seasons.title: Minnesota Archery Deer Opener
seasons.description: Official Minnesota DNR statewide archery deer opener for 2026.

seasons.title: Minnesota Firearm Deer Opener
seasons.description: Official Minnesota DNR first regular firearm deer opener for 2026; closing dates vary by deer permit area/season.

seasons.title: Minnesota Muzzleloader Deer Opener
seasons.description: Official Minnesota DNR statewide muzzleloader deer opener for 2026.

WI.source: Wisconsin Department of Natural Resources hunting season dates

seasons.title: Wisconsin Archery / Crossbow Deer Opener
seasons.description: Official Wisconsin DNR statewide archery and crossbow deer opener for 2026. Extended seasons apply in some metro subunits/counties after the regular statewide season.

seasons.title: Wisconsin Gun Deer Opener
seasons.description: Official Wisconsin DNR gun deer opener for 2026.

seasons.title: Wisconsin Muzzleloader Deer Opener
seasons.description: Official Wisconsin DNR muzzleloader deer opener for 2026.
